articles.title: Framework delays its first Laptop 13 Pro shipments by a month - The Verge
articles.description: Framework’s new flagship Laptop 13 Pro is delayed a month, with first batch shipments now expected in July instead of June thanks to issues with the new haptic trackpad and custom display.
